US: US1: As a coach, I should be able to see the "Saved Responses" button in Inbox if the workspace subscription is a Paid plan (from Pro) or Trial Plan
AC: AC1: Workspace is in Trial or Paid plans
Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Ensure workspace is in {plan}
3. Open Inbox tab
4. Verify "Saved Responses" button
Title: button enabled
Expectation: - SHOULD display "Saved Responses" button as enabled in the inbox chat

Title: save and use saved message
Expectation: - SHOULD allow user to save and use saved message as current behavior

AC: AC2: Workspace is in Free Plan
Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Ensure workspace is in Free Plan
3. Open Inbox tab
4. Verify "Saved Responses" button
Title: button disabled with upgrade icon
Expectation: - SHOULD disable the "Saved Responses" button and show upgrade icon

Step:
5. Hover on the upgrade icon
6. Verify tooltip
Title: hover tooltip
Expectation: - SHOULD display tooltip "Upgrade to use Save Response feature"

Title: hover button state
Expectation: - SHOULD change button state as in the design

Step:
1. Login as Owner/Admin
2. Ensure workspace is in Free Plan
3. Open Inbox tab
4. Click "Saved Responses" button
5. Verify billing page
Title: Owner/Admin click navigates to billing
Expectation: - SHOULD navigate to billing page which focuses on "Pro" plan

Title: billing page current behavior
Expectation: - SHOULD display other current behavior in billing page following current logics

Step:
1. Login as Trainer
2. Ensure workspace is in Free Plan
3. Open Inbox tab
4. Click "Saved Responses" button
5. Verify pop-up
Title: Trainer click shows upgrade pop-up
Expectation: - SHOULD show pop-up informing trainer to reach out to workspace owner for upgrade

Title: Trainer pop-up shows owner name
Expectation: - SHOULD display workspace owner's name in the pop-up

Title: Trainer pop-up same as broadcast
Expectation: - SHOULD show same pop-up design as broadcast feature upgrade pop-up

Step:
6. Click "x" on pop-up
7. Verify pop-up closes
Title: Trainer close pop-up
Expectation: - SHOULD close the upgrade pop-up

AC: AC3: Update Billing Page with "Saved Responses" option
Step:
1. Login as Owner/Admin
2. Navigate to Billing page
3. View "Compare" section
4. Verify "Saved Responses" option in Pro plan
Title: Pro plan display option
Expectation: - SHOULD display "Saved Responses" option in Pro plan in "Compare" section

Title: Pro plan highlight
Expectation: - SHOULD highlight "Saved Responses" option in "Pro" plan

Step: 5. Verify "Saved Responses" option in Studio plan
Title: Studio plan display option
Expectation: - SHOULD display "Saved Responses" option in Studio plan in "Compare" section

Title: Studio plan no highlight
Expectation: - SHOULD not highlight "Saved Responses" option in "Studio" plan

Title: option title
Expectation: - SHOULD display title "Saved Responses"

Step:
6. Hover on "Saved Responses" option
7. Verify tooltip
Title: hover tooltip
Expectation: - SHOULD show tooltip "Save and reuse message templates to respond to client inquiries instantly from your Inbox."

Step:
1. Login as Owner/Admin
2. Ensure workspace is in Bundle plan
3. Navigate to Billing page
4. View billing modal
5. Verify "Saved Responses" option
Title: Bundle plan no option
Expectation: - SHOULD not display "Saved Responses" option in the billing modal

Step:
1. Login as Trainer
2. Ensure workspace is in {plan}
3. Open Saved Responses function
4. Admin/Owner downgrades workspace to Free plan
5. Verify Saved Responses function
Title: block Saved Responses function
Expectation: - SHOULD block the Saved Responses function

Title: request trainer log out with pop-up
Expectation: - SHOULD request the trainer to log out and show pop-up same as broadcast feature downgrade
